segments.text: Everything you need to know about the
YouTube Partner Program in 2026.
There are now two tiers. Tier one
unlocks channel memberships and super
thanks. For this you need 500
subscribers, three uploads in the last 90
days, and either 3,000 watch hours in
the past year or 3 million shorts views
in 90 days.
The second tier is where the real
money is as it gets you full ad revenue.
For this, you need 1,000 subscribers and
either 4,000 watch hours in the past
year or 10 million shorts views in the
last 90 days. This is the one most
people are chasing. But here's something
people always get wrong. Hitting those
numbers does not automatically get you
in. You still have to apply and YouTube
manually reviews your channel. So, if
your content has any policy violations
or anything that looks lowquality, you
can hit every number and still get
rejected.
